Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20201 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}What kind of flowers are you looking for today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20204 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}Thank you for stopping by. Please come again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20202 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}Welcome. We have some new items in stock.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}We have a new variety called {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}s... They gwow to be vewy yum-yum...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Golden Tomato Sprouts{f 0 1 27} can now be purchased at Rafflesia.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Um, so... what kind of flowers are you looking for today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20204 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}I'm very sorry. Everything is out of stock at the moment. Please come by another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}...Oh, yes. Our seedlings have a reputation for growing very fast.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}We also stock special varieties that you won't find anywhere else... Why don't you try growing some?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ah, I see your friend isn't with you today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm talking about the boy in the cap who came by the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Oh, by the way, those white flowers he was eyeing just sold out a while ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The next shipment of them hasn't been scheduled yet... I'm sorry about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20201 0 0}But, we do have other varieties available. Please take your time looking around.[n]{f 1 1}
